_comment: Frontier-lab AI researcher transfers. Curated by hand. Each entry is a NAMED, publicly-reported move. fee = reported/rumored comp (mark rumored:true if disputed). Keep it accurate — every row should be defensible with a source link.

transfers.name: John Jumper
transfers.title: Nobel laureate, AlphaFold co-creator
transfers.note: Marquee signing. Nobel Prize in Chemistry 2024 for AlphaFold. Confirmed via his own X post.

transfers.name: Andrej Karpathy
transfers.title: Founding OpenAI member, ex-Tesla AI
transfers.note: One of the most-followed names in AI. Date approximate.

transfers.name: Ross Nordeen
transfers.title: Last of xAI's 11 co-founders to leave
transfers.note: Completes the unwind of xAI's founding team. Date approximate.

transfers.name: Andrew Tulloch
transfers.title: Thinking Machines Lab co-founder
transfers.note: Headline package reported at ~$1.5B over 6 years. Meta called the figure "inaccurate and ridiculous" — treat as rumored.

transfers.name: Barret Zoph
transfers.title: Returned to OpenAI
transfers.note: Part of a cluster move back to OpenAI from Thinking Machines Lab.

transfers.name: Luke Metz
transfers.title: ex-OpenAI, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Returned to OpenAI alongside Zoph and Schoenholz.

transfers.name: Sam Schoenholz
transfers.title: ex-Google Brain, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Third of the Thinking Machines Lab cluster to rejoin OpenAI.

transfers.name: Devendra Chaplot
transfers.title: ex-Mistral, ex-Thinking Machines Lab
transfers.note: Thinking Machines Lab continues to bleed talent in multiple directions.

transfers.name: Jan Leike
transfers.title: Former OpenAI superalignment co-lead
transfers.note: The move that arguably opened the transfer window. Left over safety priorities.
